ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "enrollment_no" TEXT /* Enrollment number of the student */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheme the student is part of */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission of the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic scheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheme */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scheme */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scheme */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheme the subject belongs to */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the subject */,
  "prerequisite_subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite subject */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_prerequisite_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Internal, External, Laboratory) */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the assessment is internal or external */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks possible for the assessment */,
  "min_passing_marks" INTEGER /* Minimum passing marks for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student in the assessment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments on the performance */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the student */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester for which the credits are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_credits_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_schemes" (
  "subject_scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between subject and scheme */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scheme */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the subject is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_schemes_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_schemes_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_subjects" (
  "assessment_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between assessment and subject */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the assessment is conducted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_subjects_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_assessments" (
  "performance_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between performance record and assessment */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the performance was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_assessments_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES student_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_credits" (
  "student_credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between student and credit record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credit record */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester for which the credits are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_credits_credit_id FOREIGN KEY ("credit_id") REFERENCES total_credits ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_credits_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
